landing.heroSubtitle: Affordable car rentals for every journey. Wide selection, simple booking, reliable service.
landing.featuredSubtitle: Handpicked cars for comfort, reliability, and value
landing.why1Desc: Economy to luxury — we have the right car for every need and budget.
landing.why2Desc: Reserve in minutes via WhatsApp, email, or phone. No complicated forms.
landing.why3Desc: Clean, well-maintained vehicles and responsive support whenever you need it.
landing.why4Desc: Transparent daily rates with no hidden fees. Great value guaranteed.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Browse our full fleet and make a reservation today.

cars.pageSubtitle: Choose from our selection of well-maintained vehicles
cars.noCars: No vehicles found in this category.

reservation.title: Reserve
reservation.subtitle: Fill in your details and choose how to send your reservation
reservation.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
reservation.dateError: Return date must be after pick-up date.

about.heroText: We've been helping customers explore the road with confidence since day one. Our mission is to provide reliable, affordable vehicles with a booking experience that's as smooth as the drive.
about.storyText: What started as a small local fleet has grown into a trusted name in car rental. We pride ourselves on personal service, well-maintained vehicles, and a commitment to making your journey stress-free.
about.value1Desc: No hidden fees. No surprises. Just honest pricing and clear terms.
about.value2Desc: Every car is regularly serviced and cleaned before each rental.
about.value3Desc: Book by phone, WhatsApp, or email — whatever works best for you.

contact.subtitle: We're here to help. Reach us any way you prefer.

footer.tagline: Affordable car rentals for every journey.
